title: The Giants Face a New Threat
description: On pages 7–9, this part follows Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #9, King Harald as God’s Knights and Elbaf’s ruling tensions push the island toward open conflict while the Straw Hats and giants react to the threat.
scene: God’s Knights and Elbaf’s ruling tensions push the island toward open conflict while the Straw Hats and giants react to the threat.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I'm telling you to move over,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So you're basically the National Treasure's Guardian, huh?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: What the heck is going on?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: What should we do to end this???

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The target is also using "conqueror's haki"!!! this is the first time for me!

dialogue.speaker: King Harald
dialogue.text: Harald must not have that "devil fruit"!!!

summary: This part advances God’s Knights Tighten Their Grip through 19 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
